title: Callejón del Romance
description: A narrow, flower-lined alleyway that captures the poetic spirit of Morelia. With its stone benches, fountains, and romantic verses engraved along the walls, it’s a favorite spot for couples, photographers, and anyone seeking a quiet moment in the heart of the city.

title: Bosque Cuauhtémoc
description: This urban forest offers shaded walking paths, playgrounds, and cultural spaces like the Museum of Natural History. It’s a peaceful retreat for families and nature lovers, just steps away from the city’s historic core.

title: Mercado de Dulces y Artesanías
description: A colorful market filled with regional sweets like ate, cocadas, and chongos zamoranos, alongside handcrafted toys, textiles, and ceramics. It’s a sensory experience that celebrates Morelia’s culinary and artistic traditions.
